title: ferray-linalg: multi_dot doesn't use optimal matrix chain ordering
description:
Question: 

Context: 

Findings: 

NumPy's np.linalg.multi_dot uses dynamic programming (_multi_dot_matrix_chain_order) to find the optimal parenthesization that minimizes total FLOPs. For example, multiplying (10x100) @ (100x5) @ (5x50) in the order ((A @ B) @ C) vs (A @ (B @ C)) can differ by 10x in cost. Check whether ferray-linalg's multi_dot implements matrix chain ordering or just multiplies left-to-right.
